edits.rationale: AIQS 3.1.4 was not found in v2 and no similar replacement clause was identified. The clause may have been deprecated — human review required.
edits.old_text: 3. **Remove Existing Die**: Carefully remove the existing die from the hydraulic press. Inspect the die for any signs of wear or damage. If any issues are identified, complete a Nonconformance Report (NCR) as per AIQS 3.1.4.
